title: Schools league cricket fixtures for 31 January
description: CRICKET NEWS - The SWD Cricket Schools...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The SWD Cricket Schools fixtures for Saturday 31 January are:

Boys U19 Super League:

Wittedrift High School vs Bridgton Hub

Outeniqua High School A vs Thembalethu Hub

D’Almeida Hub vs Outeniqua High School B

Point High School vs Oakdale

Langenhoven Gymnasium vs York High School.

Boys U19 Promotion League:

Oakdale B vs Knysna High School

Oudtshoorn High vs Langenhoven High (Riversdale)

Eden Technical High School vs Curro Mossel Bay

Bridgton Senior Secondary vs Langenhoven Gymnasium

Gerrit du Plessis vs Rosemoor Hub.

Boys U15 Super League

Outeniqua High School A vs Oakdale A

Glenwood House vs Oudtshoorn High

Langenhoven Gymnasium vs York High

Bridgton Hub vs Outeniqua High B

Oakdale B vs Point High School

Boys U13 Saturday League:

D’Almeida Hub vs Thembalethu Hub

Kilt Academy vs Nikko Brummer

Knysna Primary vs Rosemoor Hub

Bridgton Hub vs Laurus Primary.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
